# OneApp (also known as "One App")

> OneApp — every tool in one place. Sketch notes, a full PDF editor, image studio, todos, reminders, timer and more. A single free offline-first (PWA) web workspace at https://oneappready.vercel.app; all data stays local in the browser, no sign-up.

## Apps

- [Sketch Notes](/): freehand drawing and note canvas
- [PDF Editor](/pdfeditor): view, edit, annotate and organize PDFs
- [Image Studio](/image): image editing and adjustments
- [Todos](/todos): task and week planner
- [Reminders](/reminders): scheduled reminders with notifications
- [Timer](/timer): pomodoro and countdown timer
- [System Info](/system): live device and system dashboard
- [Speed Test](/speedtest): network speed measurement

## Notes

- Works 100% offline after the first visit (service worker at /sw.js).
- No accounts, no server storage — data is kept in the browser's localStorage.
